transcript:
CEO: Q1 revenue missed by 12%. We need to course-correct.
VP_Sales: I'd push back on the targets — pipeline is healthy, just slower close cycles.
CFO: Either way, we need to reduce burn. I propose freezing non-critical hiring.
CEO: Agreed. Hiring freeze on everything except eng and sales until Q3.
VP_Sales: I'll get you a revised forecast by Friday.
CFO: I'll send the updated runway model tomorrow.
